name: Whole Grain Cereal
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the grains and legumes in a large bowl.
2. To cook, measure 2 cups of the cereal mixture to 5 cups of water.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
4. Reduce heat and let it simmer until fully cooked (usually about 30-40 minutes).
5. Allow the cooked cereal to cool completely overnight.
6. In the morning, reheat individual portions in the microwave until heated through.
7. Enjoy your chewy and satisfying whole grain breakfast!
